ui.integrityDesc: We are committed to maintaining accurate tracking, secure data handling, and transparent reporting across all campaigns.

sections.heading: Scope of Services
sections.text: Reven Digital Marketing ('Agency') provides digital marketing services including but not limited to advertising, SEO, social media management, and consulting as agreed with the Client.

sections.heading: Performance Disclaimer
sections.text: While the Agency strives to improve marketing performance and return on investment, results are not guaranteed and depend on multiple factors including market conditions, competition, and platform algorithms.

sections.heading: Payments & Fees
sections.text: Clients agree to pay all service fees as outlined in the agreement. Failure to make timely payments may result in suspension or termination of services.

sections.heading: Intellectual Property
sections.text: All materials, strategies, and deliverables created by the Agency remain its property until full payment is received. Upon settlement, agreed deliverables may be transferred to the Client.

sections.heading: Client Responsibilities
sections.text: The Client agrees to provide accurate information, necessary access to accounts, and timely approvals required for campaign execution.

sections.heading: Termination
sections.text: Either party may terminate the agreement with prior written notice as defined in the service contract.

sections.heading: Information We Collect
sections.text: We collect basic personal and business information such as name, email, phone number, and marketing data required to deliver our services.

sections.heading: How We Use Information
sections.text: We use collected information to provide services, communicate with clients, improve campaigns, and analyze performance.

sections.heading: Data Security
sections.text: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect client data from unauthorized access, disclosure, or misuse.

sections.heading: Third-Party Services
sections.text: We may use third-party platforms such as Google Ads, Meta Ads, and analytics tools to manage campaigns. These platforms have their own privacy policies.

sections.heading: Data Retention
sections.text: We retain client data only as long as necessary to provide services or comply with legal obligations.

sections.heading: User Rights
sections.text: Clients may request access, correction, or deletion of their personal data by contacting us.
